chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1902 of 2013 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.5930/2013 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 11.10.2023 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate for respondent No.3. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner was a Clerk, appointed on 01.07.2010 on contract basis in Taluka Municipal Administration, Mirpur Mathelo, District Ghotki. An advertisement dated 28.08.2011 was issued inviting applications for the post of Assistant in the said Municipality. Per petitioner, he applied and succeeded in interview, but the merit list was not issued and favourites were appointed. Hence, he has filed this petition. We have heard parties at some length and dispose of this petition with their consent directing the petitioner to apply in the upcoming recruitment process whenever an advertisement for such post is published, and his case may be considered sympathetically by the competent authority in accordance with law. However, on application for appointment by the petitioner, the question of his age shall not be attended to because of pendency of this petition since 2013. The petition stands disposed of along with listed application, in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
